summary: Backend testing complete for iteration 29: Download Links Module (Liens de téléchargement). All 27 tests passed. Verified Supabase proxy endpoints, TMDB enrichment, deduplication, pagination, filtering, admin config with limit clamping, admin stats, security (no credential leakage), and security headers.
passed_tests: GET /api/download-links/recent returns items with TMDB enrichment (title, poster_path, backdrop_path, vote_average)
GET /api/download-links/recent deduplicates by (tmdb_id, media_type) - each unique content appears only once
GET /api/download-links/recent items contain: tmdb_id, media_type, quality, resolution, language, created_at, season_number, episode_number, title, poster_path
GET /api/download-links?page=1&limit=24 returns paginated list with {items, page, limit, total, has_more}
GET /api/download-links?quality=FHD filters correctly (all returned items have quality=FHD)
GET /api/download-links?media_type=movie filters correctly (all returned items have media_type=movie)
GET /api/download-links?q=matrix searches in release_name/source_name/ww_id
GET /api/download-links?sort=created_at.asc sorts oldest first
GET /api/download-links combined filters (quality + media_type) work correctly
GET /api/download-links/for-content?tmdb_id=603&media_type=movie returns all links for Matrix
GET /api/download-links/for-content?tmdb_id=1399&media_type=tv&season=1&episode=1 filters by season/episode
GET /api/download-links/for-content with invalid media_type returns 400
GET /api/download-links/config returns module config (public, no auth required)
PUT /api/admin/download-links/config returns 401 without auth
PUT /api/admin/download-links/config returns 403 for non-admin user
PUT /api/admin/download-links/config clamps limit to 4-30 range (tested min=1→4, max=100→30)
GET /api/admin/download-links/stats returns 401 without auth
GET /api/admin/download-links/stats returns {total, last_24h} - verified total=15234
Supabase credentials (service_role key) NOT exposed in /recent response body or headers
Supabase credentials NOT exposed in /download-links response
Supabase credentials NOT exposed in /for-content response
Supabase credentials NOT exposed in /config response
All download-links endpoints return only active (is_active=true), valid (is_valid=true), approved (status=approved) items
Security headers present on /recent (X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff, Referrer-Policy)
Security headers present on /download-links endpoint
Security headers present on /config endpoint
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Supabase WWembed data (~15870 records)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 backend features validated: Download Links Module (Liens de téléchargement) that proxies Supabase WWembed database. Key endpoints: (1) GET /api/download-links/recent?limit=N - returns N most recent unique (tmdb_id, media_type) links with TMDB enrichment (title, poster_path). (2) GET /api/download-links?page=X&limit=Y&quality=Z&media_type=M&q=search&sort=created_at.asc - paginated, filterable list. (3) GET /api/download-links/for-content?tmdb_id=X&media_type=Y&season=S&episode=E - all links for specific content. (4) GET /api/download-links/config - public module config. (5) PUT /api/admin/download-links/config - admin config update with limit clamping 4-30. (6) GET /api/admin/download-links/stats - admin stats {total, last_24h}. All endpoints filter to is_active=true, is_valid=true, status=approved. Supabase credentials stay on backend only.
